author: lOrm
content: Phase 1 done in this dispatch: READ_TRACKER refactored to session-keyed buckets, mirroring the per-thread SessionIdGuard pattern already in tools::todo (#518). file/mod.rs ReadFileTracker now holds Mutex<HashMap<String, Vec<PathBuf>>>; mark_read/has_been_read consult tools::todo::current_session_key() to pick the bucket. clear_all() wipes every bucket for resets; per-session clear() deferred to phase 2. 1357 lib tests + 139 integration tests = 1496 pass, zero regressions. 3 new tests pin isolation, round-trip, clear_all. cargo clippy zero diagnostics on the touched files. No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore]. Phase 2 follow-up: thread ReadFileTracker / todo store / BACKGROUND_SHELLS / CHAINLINK_INSTALL_SHOWN through ToolContext so session state is owned rather than thread-local; add per-session clear() once SessionState::drop has a caller.
